mapper.select: select id, activity_id, department, applied_level, locked_pass_count, locked_reject_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from ActivityRangeSetting where activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.insert: insert into ActivityRangeSetting(activity_id, department, applied_level, locked_pass_count, locked_reject_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values(#{activityId}, #{department}, #{appliedLevel}, #{lockedPassCount}, #{lockedRejectCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate()) on duplicate key update locked_pass_count = values(locked_pass_count), locked_reject_count = values(locked_reject_count), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = sysdate()
